misc: Famous for being an ambassador for the AimPoint method for putting.
biography: Timo, a celebrated figure from Keimola Golf, is set to make his ninth appearance at the Hector Trophée in 2026. A formidable competitor, Timo has secured the coveted Hector Trophée on three prior occasions, marking him as a significant player to watch.

Beyond his achievements on the course, Timo is widely recognized as a prominent ambassador for the AimPoint method of putting. His dedication to this technique has not only refined his own game but has also influenced countless others in their pursuit of golfing excellence.

Known for his meticulous approach and unwavering focus, Timo brings a level of professionalism to the tournament that is admired by peers and spectators alike. His commitment to precision and strategic play makes him a consistent contender, and his passion for the sport is evident in every swing.

Off the course, Timo is described as a thoughtful and engaging individual, always willing to share his insights and experiences with fellow golfers. His presence adds a layer of camaraderie to the event, making him a respected and valued member of the Hector Trophée community.
